text.title: embeddings-batch-and-cache Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for embeddings-batch-and-cache as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Sorting batch results by response order rather than by the index field returned by the API.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: OpenAI and other APIs do not guarantee result ordering matches input ordering. Always sort by the index field on the response objects to preserve the original text-to-embedding mapping.

failure-mode.description: Caching embeddings in a dict keyed only by text, shared across model versions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: When the model changes, all cached embeddings become invalid but appear valid. Include the model identifier in the cache key to enforce automatic invalidation.
